intendedPractice: small business bookkeeping and accounting practice
reviewRule: No task becomes client-facing advice, an external lodgment, payment instruction, or statutory approval without the required human authority and current-source review.

tasks.frequency: once per client; review on material change
controls: verify authority before accessing or releasing information
record scope and delegated approval limits
route incomplete/high-risk onboarding to reviewer

calculation.name: duplicate candidate score
calculation.template: compare supplier, date, amount, reference and image/text similarity; a score is a review signal, not proof

controls: preserve original document
do not infer missing tax treatment
flag low confidence, duplicates, personal/unclear use, and missing evidence

input: purchase order or approval where used

calculation.name: payable outstanding
calculation.template: bill total - supplier credits applied - payments applied

controls: check duplicate supplier/date/reference/amount
separate coding from payment approval
verify supplier bank-detail changes through an approved independent channel

calculation.name: receivable outstanding
calculation.template: invoice total - credit notes applied - receipts applied; bucket by days from due date

controls: do not write off or change invoice terms without authority
flag unmatched receipts and related-party/customer balances

tasks.frequency: monthly minimum; more often where agreed

calculation.name: unexplained difference
calculation.template: statement closing balance - adjusted ledger balance; expected result is zero after valid outstanding items are identified

controls: each reconciled line must trace to evidence
review stale reconciling items
do not force a reconciliation by posting an unsupported adjustment

calculation.name: net pay
calculation.template: gross earnings + approved allowances/overtime - PAYG withholding - authorised deductions; super, leave and award treatment require current approved inputs

controls: do not infer employee award or pay rate
separate preparation from payment release
retain required payroll records/payslip evidence
flag employee master-data/bank-detail changes

calculation.name: draft net GST position
calculation.template: GST on taxable supplies - eligible GST credits, adjusted for approved corrections; map only after confirming entity, basis, period and current ATO guidance

controls: confirm service provider registration/supervision
do not lodge without authorised approval
retain period, basis, source and reviewer details
route uncertain supply classification and amendments to reviewer

input: payroll and asset/loan schedules if relevant

calculation.name: trial balance control
calculation.template: sum of debits - sum of credits = 0; profit before tax = income - cost of sales - operating expenses

controls: report selected reporting basis and period
investigate material/unusual variance
do not post unsupported month-end journals

calculation.name: roll-forward checks
calculation.template: opening balance + approved movements = closing balance for each controlled schedule

controls: bookkeeper prepares evidence; accountant decides adjustments/tax/reporting treatment
retain versioned workpapers
do not mark financial statements final without authorised approval
do not decide solvency or alter company details without authorised instruction
track due dates and retain final confirmation
